summary: Essentials page updates - All 9 feature tests PASSED. Verified: subtitle removed, holographic sleeves restored (6 products in Vinyl Protection), TS Charms renamed with correct descriptor, Sabrina descriptor updated, section dividers visible, Essentials removed from profile dropdown, Essentials present in navbar, background inherits app honeycomb (#FFF6E6), and holographic modal shows 'The Honey Groove × VinylSupplyCo' header.

subtitle_removed.details: 'Preserve the pressings. Protect the hive.' NOT present. Only 'The curated essentials that keep your vault sweet.' subtext shown.

holographic_sleeves_restored.details: Vinyl Protection section contains 6 products: Vinyl Record Cleaning Kit, Premium Outer Sleeves, Anti-Static Inner Sleeves, Holographic Cracked Ice, Holographic Lovely, Holographic Pearl Shimmer

ts_charms_name.details: Product shows 'TS Charms' (NOT 'TS Inspired Charms'). Descriptor: 'There's a perfect charm for every era.'

sabrina_descriptor.details: Sabrina Charms shows correct descriptor: 'From espresso cups to pretty girl avenue, Vinyl Charms has you covered.'

section_dividers.details: Found 2 gold-tinted dividers (rgba(218,165,32,0.2)) between Vinyl Charms/Protection and Protection/Light Up sections with proper mt-10 sm:mt-14 mb-10 sm:mb-14 spacing

profile_dropdown_no_essentials.details: Profile dropdown contains: Profile, Settings, Orders, Help, Admin Panel (admin user), Disputes, Log out. NO 'Essentials' item (data-testid='menu-essentials' not present)

navbar_essentials_present.details: Essentials link visible in top navbar (data-testid='nav-essentials') and mobile bottom nav (data-testid='mobile-essentials')

honeycomb_background.details: Essentials page inherits app background (rgb(255, 246, 230) / #FFF6E6). No hardcoded bg-[#FDFAF5] class found.

holographic_modal.details: Clicking 'Acquire via Partner' on Cracked Ice opens GrooveTerminalModal with header 'The Honey Groove × VinylSupplyCo'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Essentials page fully tested. VINYL_CHARMS has 3 products, VINYL_PROTECTION has 6 products (including 3 holographic sleeves from VinylSupplyCo), LIGHT_UP has 1 product. GrooveTerminalModal used for non-Amazon partners (vinylcharms, vinylsupplyco), GrooveGatewayModal for Amazon. SectionHeader component has showDivider prop for gold horizontal dividers. Profile dropdown accessible via data-testid='user-menu-trigger'. Mobile nav at data-testid='mobile-bottom-nav'.
